## Quality Checks

### Quick Scorecard (0-2 each)

- Reproducibility: 0 / 1 / 2
- Baseline quality: 0 / 1 / 2
- Evaluation depth: 0 / 1 / 2
- Interview readiness: 0 / 1 / 2
- Production readiness: 0 / 1 / 2
- Total: /10

### Full Rubric (0-100)

- Learning Design: /20
- Reproducibility: /15
- Modeling Quality: /20
- Evaluation Quality: /20
- Practical Value: /15
- Readability and Structure: /10
- Total: /100

Recommended minimums:
- Quick scorecard >= 8/10
- Full rubric >= 80/100

Reference docs:
- docs/notebook_contributor_checklist.md
- docs/notebook_review_sheet.md
- docs/notebook_quality_rubric.md

## Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] Notebook runs top-to-bottom without manual fixes
- [ ] Notebook outputs are stripped
- [ ] Fixed seeds and deterministic split strategy are used
- [ ] Baseline is included and compared
- [ ] Failure analysis section is included
- [ ] Production lens section is included
- [ ] Interview lens section is included
- [ ] README topic mapping is updated (if required)
- [ ] New dependencies are added to requirements/environment files (if required)

## Reviewer Notes

Add any context that helps reviewers assess tradeoffs and choices.
